sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n75371" key="o)rso/lopos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀρσόλοπ-ος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, perh. <sense id="n75371.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">eager for the fray, tempestuous,</tr_> epith. of Ares, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0237.tlg001:70" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anacr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">70</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
